eason_chin.name: Eason Chin
eason_chin.summary:
Eason Chin is a rising force in junior badminton, already collecting 3 tournament titles among 23 career entries across 10 tournaments. The trajectory is unmistakable — this is a player whose best chapters are still being written.

A true triple-threat, Eason competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting 2 doubles titles, 1 mixed doubles title. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Eason has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 5 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Allen Wu — 6 events, 1 title together in BD
  • Yuki Guan — 4 events, 1 title together in XD

The 2023-2024 season has been a step up, with 2 titles across 2 tournaments — an improvement that shows Eason is still ascending. The best may yet be ahead.

Eason has competed at both U11 and U13, showing the adaptability needed to thrive as the competition grows fiercer with each age group.

With tournaments spanning Midwest, NorCal, SoCal, Eason isn't afraid to compete outside the home region — and that exposure to different playing styles only sharpens the game.

With 3 seasons of competitive experience under the belt, Eason brings the kind of tournament-tested composure that only comes from years of stepping onto the court and competing against the best.
